1131.reason: [The logic for determining statement types uses flawed lookahead with match_LVal() which consumes tokens and requires backtracking with pos = prevPos, but the implementation doesn't properly handle all cases. Specifically, match_LVal() calls match_AddExp() which can consume multiple tokens, making accurate backtracking impossible with just storing the initial position. This leads to incorrect parsing decisions and potential infinite loops or missed errors.]
